_about: Breakpoint Sweep — draw an automation curve and let it drive a filter. sndfile~ (auto-loads sounds/tonal/drone.wav) -> filter~ -> dac~, with a scope. The breakpoint~ object holds a line-segment curve (click its canvas to add points, drag to move, right-click to delete) that plays back over 'dur' seconds, synced to the transport, and drives the filter's cutoff between lo and hi. This is the real-time equivalent of a CDP breakpoint file. Start Audio, then Play; edit the curve while it runs.
